CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, text VARCHAR);
SELECT left_grapheme(text, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT left_grapheme(text, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT left_grapheme(text, 3) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT left_grapheme(text, 1) AS first_grapheme FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT t.id, left_grapheme(t.text, 2) FROM test_strings t WHERE length(t.text) > 3;
SELECT t1.id, left_grapheme(t2.text, 1) FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id != t2.id;
SELECT left_grapheme(t.text, -1) FROM test_strings t WHERE t.id = 1;
SELECT left_grapheme(t.text, null) FROM test_strings t WHERE t.id = 2;
SELECT t.id, left_grapheme(t.text, 1) AS grapheme FROM test_strings t WHERE grapheme IS NOT NULL;
WITH grapheme_extracted AS (SELECT id, left_grapheme(text, 1) AS grapheme FROM test_strings) SELECT * FROM grapheme_extracted WHERE grapheme != '';
